tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsAssociationsCreate
tools.description: Creates an Association instance under a given Catalog.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsAssociationsList
tools.description: Lists all Association resources under a catalog.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Catalog resource.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets IAM policy for the specified Catalog.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsList
tools.description:
Lists Catalog resources that the producer has access to, within the
scope of the parent resource.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsProductsCopy
tools.description: Copies a Product under another Catalog.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsProductsCreate
tools.description: Creates a Product instance under a given Catalog.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsProductsIconsUpload
tools.description:
Creates an Icon instance under a given Product.
If Product only has a default icon, a new Icon
instance is created and associated with the given Product.
If Product already has a non-default icon, the action creates
a new Icon instance, associates the newly created
Icon with the given Product and deletes the old icon.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsProductsList
tools.description:
Lists Product resources that the producer has access to, within the
scope of the parent catalog.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsProductsVersionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a Version instance under a given Product.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsProductsVersionsDelete
tools.description: Hard deletes a Version.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsProductsVersionsGet
tools.description: Returns the requested Version resource.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsProductsVersionsList
tools.description:
Lists Version resources that the producer has access to, within the
scope of the parent Product.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsProductsVersionsPatch
tools.description: Updates a specific Version resource.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the IAM policy for the specified Catalog.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Tests the IAM permissions for the specified Catalog.

tools.name: catalogs.cloudprivatecatalogproducerCatalogsUndelete
tools.description: Undeletes a deleted Catalog and all resources under it.

tools.name: operations.cloudprivatecatalogproducerOperationsCancel
tools.description:
Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation.  The server
makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not
guaranteed.  If the server doesn't support this method, it returns
`google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.  Clients can use
Operations.GetOperation or
other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the
operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation,
the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with
an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1,
corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: operations.cloudprivatecatalogproducerOperationsList
tools.description:
Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the
server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

NOTE: the `name` binding allows API services to override the binding
to use different resource name schemes, such as `users/*/operations`. To
override the binding, API services can add a binding such as
`"/v1/{name=users/*}/operations"` to their service configuration.
For backwards compatibility, the default name includes the operations
collection id, however overriding users must ensure the name binding
is the parent resource, without the operations collection id.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
